title: Alzheimer's Research Shifts Focus to Non-Amyloid Targets
description: Alzheimer's drug discovery is moving beyond amyloid plaques to explore diverse mechanisms like epigenetics, DNA repair, and tau pathology. This article examines the most promising non-amyloid candidates and the challenges of tackling a multifactorial disease.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for Alzheimer's Research Shifts Focus to Non-Amyloid Targets
